mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.role_key, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.role_key, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, dept_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{deptId}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
